data.name: Hentai Tales: Sister Inferno
data.detailed_description:
遊戲玩法

在享受撩人故事的同時破解燒腦謎題！
將數字依序相連，填滿棋盤所有方格
完成謎題即可解鎖全新香豔畫面與後續劇情！
你能否破解所有謎題，邂逅全部女孩？！

故事背景

我猝不及防地墜入了異世界——這裡的居民與其說是人類，不如說是夢魔的化身。
因擁有特殊「體力」而被冠上「沉默打樁機」這荒謬稱號的我，如今日夜承受著懶惰修女與收留我的慷慨住持所帶來的，既激情又荒誕失控的「侍奉」。

角色介紹

修女：

自稱虔誠聖職者，實則是又懶又色的惹事精。總愛挑釁你，最終總被整治得筋疲力盡卻心滿意足。

住持大人：

自稱虔誠聖職者，實則是又懶又色的惹事精。總愛挑釁你，最終總被整治得筋疲力盡卻心滿意足。

遊戲特色

  • 收錄20張美少女香豔刺激的撩人畫作
  • 與性格鮮明的女孩們展開奇幻情慾物語
  • 可跳過謎題直接享受劇情（謎題中按Enter鍵）
  • CG鑑賞模式（破關後點擊CG左右切換鍵）

*具備完整音效支援的語言

data.name: Hentai Tales: Sister Inferno
data.detailed_description:
GamePlay

Enjoy a sensual story while completing tricky puzzles!
Connect the numbers sequentially, using all of the squares on the board
After completing a puzzle, you will unlock a sexy new image and the next part of the story!
Can you complete every puzzle and meet all of the girls?!

Story Background

I suddenly found myself in another world where the inhabitants resemble succubi more than humans.
My unique "stamina" earned me the ridiculous title "Silent Pile Driver," and now my days are filled with passionate, humorous, and utterly chaotic "services" from a lazy nun and the generous Master who took me in.

Characters

Sister:

A self-proclaimed devout nun who is actually a lazy, horny troublemaker. Loves to provoke and challenge you, but always ends up completely exhausted and satisfied.

Master:

A self-proclaimed devout nun who is actually a lazy, horny troublemaker. Loves to provoke and challenge you, but always ends up completely exhausted and satisfied.

Features

  • 20 sexy and erotic images of beautiful girls.
  • A fantastical erotic story with girls who have unique personalities.
  • You can skip the puzzles if you just want to enjoy the story. (Press Enter during a puzzle).
  • CG Gallery mode. (Click the left and right buttons next to the CG after completing a puzzle).
